content: I will replace the class implementation for the labels of "Configurações" and "Sair" in the footer of the sidebar in `CompanyDashboard.tsx` to correctly use `${isSidebarExpanded ? 'lg:inline-block' : 'lg:hidden'}`. This fixes the overlap and makes the text disappear as expected when the sidebar is collapsed.
thinking:
**Confirming Precise Match**

I've pinpointed a crucial element! The code snippet provided reveals an exact replication, specifically targeting the "Configurações" span. Line 2285 in the TypeScript code confirms its precise presence, along with the conditional display logic based on sidebar expansion, exactly as identified. I'm satisfied that this is a key building block in the overall process.

args.Description: "Fix Configurações and Sair sidebar button text visibility on collapsed sidebar in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Change label span class conditional from static lg:inline-block to dynamic lg:inline-block/lg:hidden in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
